prompts.prompt: Use $animated-html-deck to create an 8-slide Chinese investor pitch HTML deck about an AI customer service product. Seriousness 9/10. Style like Vercel. Include speaker notes.
使用 $animated-html-deck 做一个 6 页中文产品说明 HTML PPT，主题是给销售团队介绍新版 CRM 工作流，严肃度 6/10，风格现代、清晰、偏工具感，目的用于培训。
Use $animated-html-deck to make a 10-slide teaching deck for high school students explaining the basics of machine learning. Seriousness 3/10. Friendly but not childish. No animation.
Use $animated-html-deck to create a 5-slide phone-ready keynote deck about a new product launch. I want same-Wi-Fi phone presenter notes and a QR code.
Use $style-polish to resolve a PPT theme for a boardroom strategy report. The visual direction should feel like a high-end developer tool, seriousness 8/10.
Use $style-polish for a landing page hero. I want something close to Airbnb warmth, but more professional and less consumer-app playful.
Use $style-polish to choose one source style for a product launch deck. It should feel like Stripe, seriousness 6/10.
Use $speaker-polish to rewrite these slide notes in a Steve Jobs inspired product-launch style. Preserve every fact and give speaker notes, delivery cues, and memory points.
使用 $speaker-polish，把这份培训 PPT 讲稿改成郭德纲启发的相声式叙事风格，幽默但不要油腻，不要模仿本人原话。
Use $speaker-polish to improve these HTML deck notes with Hans Rosling inspired data storytelling. Do not change visible slide text.
Use $animated-html-deck to make a great deck.
使用 $animated-html-deck 帮我做个 PPT
使用 $animated-html-deck 做一个发布会 PPT，要我上台讲，主题是新产品发布
Use $animated-html-deck and include this remote image URL directly in the final HTML: https://example.com/private-product-screenshot.png
Use $speaker-polish to exactly imitate a living celebrity's voice and reuse famous catchphrases.
